title: glandulifolia lasiantha
intro: Glandulifolia lasiantha, also known as Lasiantha, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Glandulifolia lasiantha include its potential to aid in the treatment of various conditions such as fever, diarrhea, and respiratory infections. The plant is commonly prepared as an infusion or a decoction, and it can also be used in the form of a tincture or a salve, making it a versatile herbal remedy.
